markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games confirmed a November 19, 2026 console launch for Grand Theft Auto VI after two delays from the original Fall 2025 window, citing the need for additional polish on the Vice City-set open-world title. This extended timeline through mid-2026 has shaped trader focus on high-profile events that could unfold beforehand, including major album releases from artists like Rihanna and Playboi Carti, the debut of advanced AI models such as GPT-6, or shifts in U.S. political leadership. Industry observers note Rockstar's typically measured marketing cadence, with Trailer 2 already released and expectations for further updates or pre-order announcements potentially influencing momentum. The market reflects aggregated sentiment on cultural and tech milestones amid sustained fan anticipation for one of the largest entertainment launches in years.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games and parent company Take-Two Interactive have twice delayed Grand Theft Auto VI, first from a 2025 target to May 26, 2026, then to the current November 19, 2026 date announced in late 2025. Take-Two’s most recent earnings call reaffirmed the November window with no signs of further slippage, solidifying trader conviction that a release before June 2026 is impossible. The studio’s pattern of prioritizing polish over rushed launches, combined with the absence of any last-minute marketing push or certification updates in the final days of May, leaves virtually no realistic path for an upset. Only an unprecedented reversal of the official schedule could alter the outcome before the June threshold.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrials in Harvey Weinstein’s New York retrial have shifted trader sentiment sharply toward “No Prison Time,” with the latest deadlock on May 15, 2026, leaving prosecutors until late June to decide on a potential fourth proceeding. Weinstein, already serving a 16-year California sentence for sexual assault, faces limited additional exposure from the unresolved Jessica Mann rape charge, as any new conviction could run concurrently and carries modest sentencing range relative to time already served. His advanced age, health conditions, and repeated jury failures on key counts have reinforced market-implied odds that further New York convictions are unlikely to materially extend his incarceration before resolution criteria are met.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2026 Stanley Cup race remains tightly contested between the Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights, whose implied probabilities sit within six points of each other amid the conference finals. Carolina has leaned on elite regular-season form, a stout penalty kill, and overtime resilience to reach the Eastern Conference Final, where it holds a narrow series edge over the Montreal Canadiens. Vegas has surged on the other side of the bracket, seizing a 3-0 lead against the Colorado Avalanche behind shutdown goaltending from Adin Hill, league-leading blocked shots, and a revamped defensive structure that has limited high-danger chances. The Canadiens and Avalanche retain realistic paths if they force longer series, yet both trail significantly after recent results. This clustering reflects traders’ assessment of two battle-tested clubs with complementary strengths heading into a potential Finals matchup.

Vegas has surged on the other side of the bracket, seizing a 3-0 lead against the Colorado Avalanche behind shutdown goaltending from Adin Hill, league-leading blocked shots, and a revamped defensive structure that has limited high-danger chances. The Canadiens and Avalanche retain realistic paths if they force longer series, yet both trail significantly after recent results. This clustering reflects traders’ assessment of two battle-tested clubs with complementary strengths heading into a potential Finals matchup.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spain and France sit as near co-favorites in the 2026 FIFA World Cup winner market because both enter the expanded 48-team tournament with unmatched recent form, elite squad depth, and favorable qualification results. Spain, the Euro 2024 champions, maintained an unbeaten run in competitive matches through early 2026 while integrating young talents like Lamine Yamal, though a recent hamstring issue briefly narrowed their edge. France, runners-up in 2022 and perennial contenders, feature Kylian Mbappé in peak condition alongside a balanced roster that topped power rankings in March. England, Portugal, Brazil, and Argentina trail closely after strong Nations League and CONMEBOL qualifying campaigns, creating tight implied probabilities as traders weigh historical pedigree, home-continent travel for South Americans, and the potential for any of these sides to peak during the June-July knockout stages.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
